title: Uplifting greatness at the Celebration of Excellence
summary_en: Students, staff, and faculty gathered together this week to celebrate the year’s accomplishments and recognize the outstanding work happening across the school at the annual Celebration of Excellence.
title_cn: 印第安纳大学伯明顿分校“卓越庆典”框架下举办胡希尔科学教师协会小型研讨会

title: Students receive future educator award
summary_en: The Indiana Association of Colleges for Teacher Education’s Outstanding Future Educator Award recognizes academic excellence and significant professional promise, demonstrated during the student teaching experience.
title_cn: 印第安纳大学伯明顿分校5名学生获2026年度杰出未来教育工作者奖项
